name: are-we-friends
description: Are We Friends? — a Codenames x Skribbl multiplayer party game. One artist draws, one guesser clicks, the assassin card asks the hard question.

scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.postinstall: echo "Run 'npm run build' to bundle the client, then 'npm start'."
